name: Max Wild GmbH
message: Max Wild GmbH, based in Berkheim, has been responsible for the professional and sustainable implementation of numerous services in the field of construction, demolition, environment & recycling and logistics since 1955. As a family business, Max Wild offers its customers consistency and conversion strength combined with great regional connectivity. Customers receive innovative and tailor-made solutions for small and large projects and are supported with an individual service package from all divisions.
